info.title: Thunderstore API
info.description: Schema is automatically generated and not completely accurate.

post.description: Complete OAuth login process initiated by a client.

The session is provided in Authorization header and is processed by
UserSessionTokenAuthentication, which places the session key into
request.auth.

post.summary: Login user with information from Overwolf API using the received JWT
post.description:
Used by Thunderstore Mod Manager. Not to be confused with OAuth
login process triggered from a browser.

get.description: Check that valid session key is provided in Authorization header.

401.description: Session key is missing, invalid, or expired

get.description: Fetch the Community of the queried domain
Gets information about the current user, such as rated packages and permissions
Returns a list of rated packages for the current user, capped at 500 entries
Return details about a single Package.
Return paginated list of community's packages.
Return information required to render the site's front page.

Response is a stream of newline delimited JSON.

Download links are not included in the response. The client is expected to build them using the following pattern: https://thunderstore.io/package/download/{namespace}/{name}/{version_number}/

get.description: Fetch a bulk of package wikis at once. Supports querying by update time to accommodate local caching.

get.summary: Get a list of all wiki pages
get.description: Returns an index of all the pages included in the wiki

post.summary: Create or update a wiki page
post.description: Creates a new wiki page if a submission is made without the ID field set. If the ID field is set, the respective page will be updated instead.

delete.description: Deletes a wiki page by page ID

get.description: Polls the status of an async package submission by its ID.

post.description: Submits a pre-uploaded package by upload uuid asynchronously.
Submits a pre-uploaded package by upload uuid.
